name: Live TV Player
description: Stream live TV channels, IPTV playlists (M3U/M3U8), and RTSP feeds directly on your Android device or TV. Includes a built-in EPG guide, channel favourites, and picture-in-picture support.

name: NotifyVault
description: Never lose a notification again. NotifyVault silently captures every notification — even after it's dismissed — and stores it permanently. Browse your full notification history, filter by app category, star important ones, set reminders, and search across everything. Supports light and dark themes.
